weapons.name: Saber.
weapons.desc: A sword with a Photon blade. Attacks 1 enemy.

weapons.name: Saber
weapons.desc: A sword with a Photon blade. Attacks 1 enemy.

weapons.name: Brand
weapons.desc: A sword with good accuracy and power.

weapons.name: Buster
weapons.desc: An extremely high performance sword.

weapons.name: Pallasch
weapons.desc: A superior sword usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Gladius
weapons.desc: An exceptional sword. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: DB'S SABER
weapons.desc: Replica of a saber once used by the military.  An extremely common replica.

weapons.name: KALADBOLG
weapons.desc: A legendary sword long sought after by warriors. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: DURANDAL
weapons.desc: A legendary sword known as "The Knight's Blade." Its special attack steals experience points.

weapons.name: Sword
weapons.desc: A large weapon with a Photon blade.

weapons.name: Gigush
weapons.desc: A large sword with good accuracy and power.

weapons.name: Breaker
weapons.desc: A large, extremely high-performance sword.

weapons.name: Claymore
weapons.desc: A superior large sword usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Calibur
weapons.desc: An exceptional large sword. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD
weapons.desc: Replica of a sword once used by the military. An extremely common replica.

weapons.name: LAST SURVIVOR
weapons.desc: A sword said to protect its bearer in any battle. Its special attack steals HP.

weapons.name: DRAGON SLAYER
weapons.desc: A legendary sword borne by one who defeated a dragon. Adds an explosive fire attack.

weapons.name: Dagger
weapons.desc: A short Photon sword. Attacks enemies twice.

weapons.name: Knife
weapons.desc: A short sword with good power and accuracy.

weapons.name: Blade
weapons.desc: An extremely high performance short sword.

weapons.name: Edge
weapons.desc: A superior short sword usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Ripper
weapons.desc: An exceptional short sword. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: BLADE DANCE
weapons.desc: A short sword named for its dance-like attack. Its special attack paralyzes enemies.

weapons.name: BLOODY ART
weapons.desc: A legendary short sword named for all the blood that it spilled. Its special attack halves enemy HP.

weapons.name: CROSS SCAR
weapons.desc: A legendary short sword that leaves cross-shaped scars on its victims. Adds lightning damage.

weapons.name: Partisan
weapons.desc: A long sword with a Photon blade. Hits multiple enemies.

weapons.name: Halbert
weapons.desc: A long sword with good accuracy and power.

weapons.name: Glaive
weapons.desc: An extremely high performance long sword.

weapons.name: Berdys
weapons.desc: A superior long sword usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Gungnir
weapons.desc: An exceptional long sword. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: BRIONAC
weapons.desc: A legendary long sword made of precious pure Photons. Its special attack steals enemy TP.

weapons.name: VJAYA
weapons.desc: A legendary long sword for the wealthy. Can launch a powerful attack at the cost of Meseta.

weapons.name: GAE BOLG
weapons.desc: A legendary long sword that is said to become sharper with every blow. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: Slicer
weapons.desc: A throwing blade that hits multiple enemies.

weapons.name: Spinner
weapons.desc: A throwing blade with good power and accuracy.

weapons.name: Cutter
weapons.desc: An extremely high performance throwing blade.

weapons.name: Sawcer
weapons.desc: A superb throwing blade usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Diska
weapons.desc: An exceptional throwing blade. Amazing power.

weapons.name: SLICER OF ASSASSIN
weapons.desc: A legendary throwing blade used by elite assassins. Its special attack can kill instantly.

weapons.name: DISKA OF LIBERATOR
weapons.desc: A legendary throwing blade used by a Hunter called "The Liberator." Causes confusion.

weapons.name: DISKA OF BRAVEMAN
weapons.desc: A legendary throwing blade for the brave. Sacrifices HP for a powerful special attack.

weapons.name: Handgun
weapons.desc: A small gun that fires Photon bullets.

weapons.name: Autogun
weapons.desc: A small gun with good accuracy and power.

weapons.name: Lockgun
weapons.desc: An extremely high performance small gun.

weapons.name: Railgun
weapons.desc: A superior small gun usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Raygun
weapons.desc: An exceptional small gun. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: VARISTA
weapons.desc: A legendary, high-performance pistol. Its special attack causes paralysis.

weapons.name: CUSTOM RAY ver.OO
weapons.desc: A pistol used by military mechanic group "TeamOO." Proves the bearer to be a member of the team.

weapons.name: BRAVACE
weapons.desc: A legendary pistol reserved for high- ranking officers aboard Pioneer 1. Adds lightning damage.

weapons.name: Rifle

weapons.name: Sniper
weapons.desc: A rifle with good accuracy and power.

weapons.name: Blaster
weapons.desc: An extremely high performance rifle.

weapons.name: Beam
weapons.desc: A superior rifle usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Laser
weapons.desc: An exceptional rifle. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: VISK-235W
weapons.desc: A legendary rifle crafted by Visk, one of the three masters. Its special attack paralyzes enemies.

weapons.name: WALS-MK2
weapons.desc: A legendary rifle crafted by Wals, one of the three masters. Its special attack confuses enemies.

weapons.name: JUSTY-23ST
weapons.desc: A legendary rifle crafted by Justy, one of the three masters. Its special attack halves enemy HP.

weapons.name: Mechgun
weapons.desc: A machine gun that fires a hail of Photon bullets.

weapons.name: Assault
weapons.desc: A machine gun with good power and accuracy.

weapons.name: Repeater
weapons.desc: An extremely high performance machine gun.

weapons.name: Gatling
weapons.desc: A superior machine gun usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Vulcan
weapons.desc: An exceptional machine gun. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: M&A60 VISE
weapons.desc: A legendary machine gun from the Vise Corp. Sacrifices HP for a powerful special attack.

weapons.name: H&S25 JUSTICE
weapons.desc: A legendary machine gun from the Justice Corp. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: L&K14 COMBAT
weapons.desc: A legendary machine gun from the Combat Corp. Its special attack paralyzes enemies.

weapons.name: Shot
weapons.desc: A shotgun that fires a spread of Photon bullets.

weapons.name: Spread
weapons.desc: A shotgun with good accuracy and power.

weapons.name: Cannon
weapons.desc: An extremely high performance shotgun.

weapons.name: Launcher
weapons.desc: A superior shotgun usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Arms
weapons.desc: An exceptional shotgun. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: CRUSH BULLET
weapons.desc: A legendary shotgun made with concentrated pure Photons. Its special attack steals enemy HP.

weapons.name: METEOR SMASH
weapons.desc: A legendary shotgun with power that rivals a meteor strike. Its special attack steals enemy TP.

weapons.name: FINAL IMPACT
weapons.desc: A legendary shotgun with tremendous power. Its special attack steals enemies' experience points.

weapons.name: Cane
weapons.desc: A cane usable only by Forces. Has low attack power.

weapons.name: Stick
weapons.desc: A high-quality cane with average power.

weapons.name: Mace
weapons.desc: A superior cane usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Club
weapons.desc: An exceptional cane. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: CLUB OF LACONIUM
weapons.desc: A legendary cane made of sturdy Laconium metal. Its special attack adds explosive fire damage.

weapons.name: MACE OF ADAMAN
weapons.desc: Legendary cane of Adaman, when equipped, boosts Barta. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: CLUB OF ZUMIURAN
weapons.desc: Legendary cane of Zumiuran, when equipped, boosts Zonde.  Its special attack adds lightning damage.

weapons.name: Rod
weapons.desc: A battle cane made only for Forces.

weapons.name: Pole
weapons.desc: A battle cane with good accuracy and power.

weapons.name: Pillar
weapons.desc: A superior battle cane usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Striker
weapons.desc: An exceptional battle cane. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: BATTLE VERGE
weapons.desc: A legendary battle cane made so Forces can hold their own in a fight. Halves enemy HP.

weapons.name: BRAVE HAMMER
weapons.desc: A legendary battle cane for brave Forces. Its special attack uses TP to launch a powerful strike.

weapons.name: ALIVE AQHU
weapons.desc: A legendary battle cane made for a Force for intense fights. Its special attack steals enemies' HP.

weapons.name: Wand
weapons.desc: A magic cane for Forces. Boosts mind energy.

weapons.name: Staff
weapons.desc: A magic cane with good power and attributes.

weapons.name: Baton
weapons.desc: A superior magic cane usable only by masters.

weapons.name: Scepter
weapons.desc: An exceptional magic cane. Has amazing power.

weapons.name: FIRE SCEPTER:AGNI
weapons.desc: A legendary magic cane containing the power of fire. Its special attack adds fire damage.

weapons.name: ICE STAFF:DAGON
weapons.desc: A legendary magic cane containing the power of ice. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: STORM WAND:INDRA
weapons.desc: A legendary magic cane containing the power of lightning. Adds lightning damage.

weapons.name: PHOTON CLAW
weapons.desc: Claws with photon blades for quick attacks with right hand. Its special attack steals enemies' HP.

weapons.name: SILENCE CLAW
weapons.desc: Legendary claws that kill silently. Its special attack can fell enemies with a single blow.

weapons.name: NEI'S CLAW
weapons.desc: Replica of a claw of a legendary Newman.

weapons.name: DOUBLE SABER
weapons.desc: A double-bladed Photon sword. Its special attack steals enemies' TP.

weapons.name: STAG CUTLERY
weapons.desc: A legendary double-bladed sword usable only by male Hunters and Rangers. Causes confusion.

weapons.name: TWIN BRAND
weapons.desc: The ultimate double-bladed sword, only for masters. Its special attack halves enemy HP.

weapons.name: BRAVE KNUCKLE
weapons.desc: Gear for the fists and feet to boost attack power for unarmed combat. Its special attack causes paralysis.

weapons.name: ANGRY FIST
weapons.desc: Gear that boosts attack power for unarmed combat. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: GOD HAND
weapons.desc: The ultimate gear for unarmed combat. Its special attack steals experience points.

weapons.name: SONIC KNUCKLE
weapons.desc: Unarmed combat gear that allows attacks at sonic speeds. Its special attack steals experience.

weapons.name: OROTIAGITO
weapons.desc: AUW 1975 model. Made by Dousetsu.

weapons.name: AGITO (AUW 1975)
weapons.desc: AUW 1975 model. Made by Dousetsu.

weapons.name: AGITO (AUW 1983)
weapons.desc: AUW 1983 model. Made by Dousetsu.

weapons.name: AGITO (AUW 2001)
weapons.desc: AUW 2001 model. Made by Kikoku.

weapons.name: AGITO (AUW 1991)
weapons.desc: AUW 1991 model. Made by Kikoku.

weapons.name: AGITO (AUW 1977)
weapons.desc: AUW 1977 model. Made by Jou'un.

weapons.name: AGITO (AUW 1980)
weapons.desc: AUW 1980 model. Made by Tengai.

weapons.name: SOUL EATER
weapons.desc: A cursed scythe that drains HP from the user. Its special attack drains HP for a powerful strike.

weapons.name: SOUL BANISH
weapons.desc: A cursed, but powerful scythe that drains HP.

weapons.name: SPREAD NEEDLE
weapons.desc: A custom shotgun that shoots countless needles. Its special attack paralyzes enemies.

weapons.name: HOLY RAY
weapons.desc: A special gun that impales enemies with a giant spear. Its special attack paralyzes enemies.

weapons.name: INFERNO BAZOOKA
weapons.desc: A powerful bazooka with highly destructive shells.

weapons.name: FLAME VISIT
weapons.desc: A flamethrower that incinerates enemies with huge fireballs. Its special attack confuses enemies.

weapons.name: BURNING VISIT
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: AKIKO'S FRYING PAN
weapons.desc: The ultimate weapon?--hard, yet supple and smooth!

weapons.name: SORCERER'S CANE
weapons.desc: Made from a Sorcerer's cane. Boosts mid level attack techniques and reduces TP cost by 10%%.

weapons.name: S-BEAT'S BLADE
weapons.desc: An enemy weapon made from the hands of a Sinow Beat. Its special attack can kill in a single strike.

weapons.name: P-ARMS'S BLADE
weapons.desc: An enemy weapon made from the hands of a Pan Arms. Its special attack paralyzes enemies.

weapons.name: DELSABER'S BUSTER
weapons.desc: Delsaber's hand, now an enemy weapon. Powers up 100%% if used with a SHIELD OF DELSABER. Lightning damage.

weapons.name: BRINGER'S RIFLE
weapons.desc: An enemy weapon made from a Bringer's hand. Its special attack cuts enemy HP to 1/4.

weapons.name: EGG BLASTER
weapons.desc: A special gun made by a mysterious scientist out to conquer the world. Does fire damage.

weapons.name: PSYCHO WAND
weapons.desc: A mysterious cane known only as the ultimate cane. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: HEAVEN PUNISHER
weapons.desc: The ultimate gun, a weapon veiled in mystery. "Divine Punishment,"  its special attack, is based on time...

weapons.name: LAVIS CANNON
weapons.desc: Few facts or even rumors are known about this ultimate sword. Its abilities are a mystery.

weapons.name: VICTOR AXE
weapons.desc: A one-handed axe with a Photon blade. Its special attack steals HP.

weapons.name: CHAIN SAWD
weapons.desc: A large sword with small, spinning Photon blades. Its special attack steals enemy HP.

weapons.name: CADUCEUS
weapons.desc: A special weapon made from a legendary cane. Its ripple effect boosts the power of Grants.

weapons.name: STING TIP
weapons.desc: A special battle cane with needles on its tip. Its special attack steals TP.

weapons.name: MAGICAL PIECE
weapons.desc: Magical Heart-Key cane. Boosts mid level attack techniques. Its special attack adds lightning damage.

weapons.name: TECHNICAL CROZIER
weapons.desc: A special magical cane for Forces, made by an adept in science and magic. Casts Barta.

weapons.name: SUPPRESSED GUN
weapons.desc: Short gun equipped with a suppressor. It has accuracy that is trustworthy.

weapons.name: ANCIENT SABER
weapons.desc: Legendary sword found in the ancient ruins. It absorbs enemy experience.

weapons.name: HARISEN BATTLE FAN
weapons.desc: A special weapon created from the idea of traditional entertainment. Its special attack paralyzes enemies.

weapons.name: YAMIGARASU
weapons.desc: This cursed sword sucks HP from the person who wields it. Its special attack can kill an enemy with 1 hit.

weapons.name: AKIKO'S WOK
weapons.desc: The ultimate weapon that was created from a wok..?

weapons.name: TOY HAMMER
weapons.desc: Once a child's toy, it has been refined over the years to become the ultimate toy. Its power is devastating.

weapons.name: ELYSION
weapons.desc: The ancient characters on its blade produce magic. Its special attack is the fire bomb.

weapons.name: RED SABER
weapons.desc: This red saber is a prototype, so its finish is incomplete. Letters, which say "He," are carved on the hilt.

weapons.name: METEOR CUDGEL
weapons.desc: The crystals on both sides of the staff can inflict a lot of damage. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: MONKEY KING BAR
weapons.desc: The length of this staff can be changed. Its special attack can take away half of an enemy's health.

weapons.name: BLACK KING BAR
weapons.desc: Magic cane whose power has been enhanced by a blue-black stone.

weapons.name: DOUBLE CANNON
weapons.desc: A mysterious ultimate weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: HUGE BATTLE FAN
weapons.desc: Only certain players can use this ultimate weapon. Don't be deceived by its looks.

weapons.name: TSUMIKIRI J-SWORD
weapons.desc: Owned by Orochi Agito, the blade was made along the same lines as Agito, with a carved seal on the blade.

weapons.name: SEALED J-SWORD
weapons.desc: Ancient sword with its power sealed by an unknown stamp. The seal opens when all techniques are used.

weapons.name: RED SWORD
weapons.desc: This red sword is a prototype, so its finish is incomplete. Letters, which say "a," are carved on the hilt.

weapons.name: CRAZY TUNE
weapons.desc: AUW 1985 model. Made by Kikoku.

weapons.name: TWIN CHAKRAM
weapons.desc: This round sword was built for short-range attack. The attack speed is very fast and it can kill with 1 hit.

weapons.name: WOK OF AKIKO'S SHOP
weapons.desc: The excellent combination of a wok and a ladle. It's very useful for both attack and defense.

weapons.name: LAVIS BLADE
weapons.desc: A mysterious blade for use with both hands. It's very powerful, and if you use a certain item, it will become...

weapons.name: RED DAGGER
weapons.desc: This red blade is a prototype, so its finish is incomplete. Letters, which say "t," are carved on the hilt.

weapons.name: MADAM'S PARASOL
weapons.desc: Proof of Madam. Madam's dignity boosts the effective range of Resta and Anti.

weapons.name: MADAM'S UMBRELLA
weapons.desc: Proof of Madam. Madam's dignity boosts the effective range of Shifta and Deband.

weapons.name: IMPERIAL PICK
weapons.desc: The blades can kill an enemy with only one hit. Its special attack can take away half of an enemy's health.

weapons.name: BERDYSH
weapons.desc: A very powerful sword. Only Android Hunters can use it due to it's stringent requirements.

weapons.name: RED PARTISAN
weapons.desc: This red partisan is a prototype, so its finish is incomplete. Letters, which say "h," are carved on the grip.

weapons.name: FLIGHT CUTTER
weapons.desc: This throwing weapon was based on the ancient ninja's weapon.

weapons.name: FLIGHT FAN
weapons.desc: When thrown, this fan can kill several enemies at once. Its special attack steals 12%% of the enemy's experience.

weapons.name: RED SLICER
weapons.desc: This red slicer is a prototype, so its finish is incomplete. Letters, which say "cl," are carved on the grip.

weapons.name: HANDGUN:GULD
weapons.desc: A small gun with "GULD" engraved on the right side of its barrel. Its special attack steals enemy TP.

weapons.name: HANDGUN:MILLA
weapons.desc: A small gun with "Milla" engraved on the right side of its barrel. Its special attack steals enemy HP.

weapons.name: RED HANDGUN
weapons.desc: This red gun is a prototype, so its finish is incomplete. Letters, which say "i," are carved on the barrel.

weapons.name: FROZEN SHOOTER
weapons.desc: The latest freeze gun uses latent heat energy to fire a freeze bomb. Its power to freeze is excellent.

weapons.name: SNOW QUEEN
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: ANTI ANDROID RIFLE
weapons.desc: A government certified scientist created this high- performance rifle based on the A-35 rifle function.

weapons.name: ROCKET PUNCH
weapons.desc: This weapon fires a punch bomb. It does great damage, but sequence attacks are not possible.

weapons.name: SAMBA MARACAS
weapons.desc: Shaking the maracas with a Latin rhythm produces shock waves to damage enemies.

weapons.name: TWIN PSYCHOGUN
weapons.desc: These guns convert thought patterns into a laser beam to destroy enemies.

weapons.name: DRILL LAUNCHER
weapons.desc: This huge drill weapon can be attached to your hand. It is a very powerful, short- range weapon.

weapons.name: GULD MILLA
weapons.desc: A mysterious ultimate weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: RED MECHGUN
weapons.desc: This red mechgun is a prototype, so its finish is incomplete. Letters, which say "ff," are carved on the grip.

weapons.name: BELRA CANNON
weapons.desc: Belra's right hand was remodeled into this enemy weapon. Its special attack is even more powerful...

weapons.name: PANZER FAUST
weapons.desc: It fires a very powerful rocket bomb.  Its special attack can confuse enemies.

weapons.name: IRON FAUST
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: SUMMIT MOON
weapons.desc: The stone on this cane increases your mental strength. Its special attack is lightning.

weapons.name: WINDMILL
weapons.desc: The windmill-shape gives this cane its power. In order to execute its special attack, hold the wind energy, and...

weapons.name: EVIL CURST
weapons.desc: The eyes on top of this cursed cane can kill enemies. Its special attack can also kill enemies.

weapons.name: FLOWER CANE
weapons.desc: Magical cane made for females. A useful weapon, its exquisite look also makes it a popular gift.

weapons.name: HILDEBEAR'S CANE
weapons.desc: Hildebear's head was used to make this weapon. Boosts Foie. Its special attack can shoot fireballs.

weapons.name: HILDEBLUE'S CANE
weapons.desc: Hildeblue's head was used to make this weapon. Boosts Barta. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: RABBIT WAND
weapons.desc: The rabbit's head on the tip of this cane looks very cute. People often use this cane as an accessory.

weapons.name: PLANTAIN LEAF
weapons.desc: A huge leaf. Weapon becomes more powerful  once in contact with water.

weapons.name: FATSIA
weapons.desc: A huge leaf. Weapon becomes more powerful  once in contact with water.

weapons.name: DEMONIC FORK
weapons.desc: A dark weapon, infamous for its malevolent origins. Boosts the penetrating power of Megid.

weapons.name: STRIKER OF CHAO
weapons.desc: Chao tipped cane. Feel empowered with this popular character on your side.

weapons.name: BROOM
weapons.desc: This is a cleaning tool that was found in the ancient ruins. Something is carved on it.  It increases mental strength.

weapons.name: PROPHETS OF MOTAV
weapons.desc: An ancient document left by the developers of techniques. There may be secrets hidden inside...

weapons.name: THE SIGH OF A GOD
weapons.desc: A magical lightning charged cane. Boosts Zonde techniques. Its special attack adds lightning damage.

weapons.name: TWINKLE STAR
weapons.desc: Star tipped cane. Boosts 3 types of low level attack techniques. Its special attack adds lightning damage.

weapons.name: PLANTAIN FAN
weapons.desc: When you wave this magic fan once, it produces a strong wind, which blows enemies away.

weapons.name: TWIN BLAZE
weapons.desc: Flames from both ends of this magic cane will burn enemies. Its special flame attack is very powerful.

weapons.name: MARINA'S BAG
weapons.desc: This medical bag boosts the effective range for Resta and Anti, and gradually restores HP.

weapons.name: DRAGON'S CLAW
weapons.desc: A Dragon's claw was used to make this weapon. Its special attack is Foie.

weapons.name: PANTHER'S CLAW
weapons.desc: This is only available for female users. It's a very popular accessory, though it's not useful as a weapon.

weapons.name: S-RED'S BLADE
weapons.desc: Sinow Red's hands were remodeled into a weapon. Attack and defense are increased with its special attack.

weapons.name: PLANTAIN HUGE FAN
weapons.desc: When you wave this magic fan once, it produces a very strong wind, which blows enemies away.

weapons.name: CHAMELEON SCYTHE
weapons.desc: This scythe is considered a work of art because of its intricate design. Its special attack confuses enemies.

weapons.name: YASMINKOV 3000R
weapons.desc: An antique model that's popular among certain hardcore fans. The power is as strong as the new model.

weapons.name: ANO RIFLE
weapons.desc: This rifle was used as the military Android's primary weapon in a certain country.

weapons.name: BARANZ LAUNCHER
weapons.desc: Baranz's parts were used to create this enemy weapon.

weapons.name: BRANCH OF PAKUPAKU
weapons.desc: A branch that gives off a fragrance that puts Chao into a trance.

weapons.name: HEART OF POUMN
weapons.desc: A Laconiatask tempered with the Eclipse Torch's flame. Also known as "Alis' Claw."

weapons.name: YASMINKOV 2000H
weapons.desc: An antique model that's popular among certain hardcore fans. The power is as strong as the new model.

weapons.name: YASMINKOV 7000V
weapons.desc: An antique model that's popular among certain hardcore fans. The power is as strong as the new model.

weapons.name: YASMINKOV 9000M
weapons.desc: An antique model that's popular among certain hardcore fans. The power is as strong as the new model.

weapons.desc: A special gun that shoots lighting. Its accuracy is top class.

weapons.name: POWER MASER
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.desc: A beautiful flower bouquet. It smells very nice.

weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: S-RANK J-CUTTER
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: MUSASHI
weapons.desc: A pair of swords bearing the name of a double sword wielding master.

weapons.name: YAMATO
weapons.desc: A pair of swords bonded with ultra low temperature Photons. Its special attack freezes enemies.

weapons.name: ASUKA
weapons.desc: A pair of swords bonded with ultra high temperature Photons.

weapons.name: SANGE & YASHA
weapons.desc: A pair of Katanas that work perfectly in concert with one another.

weapons.name: SANGE
weapons.desc: AUW 1963 model. Made by Jou'un.

weapons.name: YASHA
weapons.desc: AUW 2018 model. Made by Kikoku.

weapons.name: KAMUI
weapons.desc: AUW 1977 model. Made by Tengai.

weapons.name: PHOTON LAUNCHER
weapons.desc: A launcher that fires Photons that can pierce through enemies. Its special attack paralyzes enemies.

weapons.name: GUILTY LIGHT
weapons.desc: A legendary Photon launcher said to have been created by an outlaw.

weapons.name: RED SCORPIO
weapons.desc: This was a highly regarded Photon launcher of a certain secret society.

weapons.name: TALIS
weapons.desc: A card charged with a mysterious energy. It does not appear to use traditional Photon based technology.

weapons.name: MAHU
weapons.desc: A card bearing an ancient magical incantation. Its special attack steals enemy TP.

weapons.name: HITOGATA
weapons.desc: A unique card resembling a human figure. Charged with powerful psychic energy, only Forces can use it.

weapons.name: DANCING HITOGATA
weapons.desc: A humanoid doll that has gained new powers through ancient sorcery.

weapons.name: NUG2000-BAZOOKA
weapons.desc: A bazooka said to have been favored on the battlefield by a brave warrior of ancient times.

weapons.name: S-BERILL'S HANDS #0
weapons.desc: Sinow Berill's hand, now a weapon. Some say there is room for further refinement, but...

weapons.name: S-BERILL'S HANDS #1
weapons.desc: Sinow Berill's knuckle with Photon camouflage.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3060)
weapons.desc: AUW 3060 model. Replica by Mick Co. First model. Popular for its simple, yet distinctive design.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3064)
weapons.desc: AUW 3064 model. Replica by Mick Co. Model that became the standard and made Mick famous.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3067)
weapons.desc: AUW 3067 model. Replica by Mick Co. Due to excessive details, this model's performance suffered.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3073)
weapons.desc: AUW 3073 model. Replica by Mick Co. Relatively few were made, so this model is highly valued among collectors.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3077)
weapons.desc: AUW 3077 model. Replica by Mick Co. Limited edition model commemorating the arrival on Ragol.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3082)
weapons.desc: AUW 3082 model. Replica by Mick Co. The weight has been reduced by the incorporation of new materials.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3083)
weapons.desc: AUW 3083 model. Replica by Mick Co. Even experts have difficulty determining its authenticity.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3084)
weapons.desc: AUW 3084 model. Thinking of his beloved Furou-uen, Horusu, Mick poured his body and soul into its creation.

weapons.name: FLOWEN'S SWORD (AUW 3079)
weapons.desc: AUW 3079 model. Replica by Mick Co. No compromises were made to allow it to reach its apex of refinement.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3062)
weapons.desc: AUW 3062 model. Replica by Mick Co. First model. Popular replica due to its simple, yet distinctive design.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3067)
weapons.desc: AUW 3067 model. Replica by Torato Co. A perfect replica, down to the identical materials and process.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3069)
weapons.desc: AUW 3069 model. Replica by Chris Co. Effort was put into replicating its function more so than its look.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3064)
weapons.desc: AUW 3064 model. Replica by Mick Co. Second model. Extremely few were made, making it rare and precious.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3069)
weapons.desc: AUW 3069 model. Replica by Torato Co. Experts have a difficult time telling this replica apart from the real model.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3073)
weapons.desc: AUW 3073 model. Replica by Chris Co. The replica's blade is superior because of its use of higher grade material.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3070)
weapons.desc: AUW 3070 model. Replica by Mick Co. Due to excessive details, this model's performance suffered.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3075)
weapons.desc: AUW 3075 model. Replica by Torato Co. No compromises were made to allow it to reach its apex of refinement.

weapons.name: DB's SWORD (AUW 3077)
weapons.desc: AUW 3077 model. Replica by Mick Co. Limited edition model commemorating the arrival on Ragol.

weapons.name: GI GUE BAZOOKA
weapons.desc: Gi Gue's body, now an enemy weapon.

weapons.name: GUARDIANNA
weapons.desc: A sacred weapon with an arcing fan shaped attack. Its special attack uses TP to launch a powerful strike.

weapons.name: VIRIDIA CARD
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: GREENILL CARD
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: REDRIA CARD
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: ORAN CARD
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: YELLOWBOZE CARD
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: WHITILL CARD
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: MORNING GLORY
weapons.desc: Claw forged from Morningium, which is said to show its true strength under the light of the morning sun.

weapons.name: PARTISAN of LIGHTNING
weapons.desc: A double-edged halberd that can rip the enemy apart with a lightning fast attack.

weapons.name: GAL WIND
weapons.desc: Gal Gryphon's wings, now an enemy weapon.

weapons.name: ZANBA
weapons.desc: A legendary long sword said to be able to slice through anything in a single stroke.

weapons.name: RIKA'S CLAW
weapons.desc: A mysterious mechanical claw created by a legendary Newman. It boosts mid level attack techniques.

weapons.name: ANGEL HARP
weapons.desc: A wondrous gun whose effects are said to be enhanced by the power of love.

weapons.name: DEMOLITION COMET
weapons.desc: A double-hit weapon that shreds enemies with countless Photon blades.

weapons.name: NEI'S CLAW
weapons.desc: Claw used by a legendary Newman. Its aura boosts the power of low level attack techniques.

weapons.name: RAINBOW BATON
weapons.desc: Wand with the magic stone Iritista embedded in it.

weapons.name: DARK FLOW
weapons.desc: Sword eroded by Olga Flow DNA. Its power is awakened when its owner is in danger.

weapons.name: DARK METEOR
weapons.desc: Long range weapon eroded by Olga Flow DNA. When equipped, two different attacks can be used.

weapons.name: DARK BRIDGE
weapons.desc: A claw imprinted with Olga Flow DNA. The dark malignant Photons still retain the power of ancient techniques.

weapons.name: G-ASSASSIN'S SABERS
weapons.desc: Enemy weapon made from the two arms of a Grass Assassin.

weapons.name: RAPPY'S FAN
weapons.desc: Enemy weapon made from the wings of a Rappy.

weapons.name: BOOMA'S CLAW
weapons.desc: Enemy weapon made from the right arm of a Booma.

weapons.name: GOBOOMA'S CLAW
weapons.desc: Enemy weapon made from the right arm of a Gobooma.

weapons.name: GIGOBOOMA'S CLAW
weapons.desc: Enemy weapon made from the right arm of a Gigobooma.

weapons.name: RUBY BULLET
weapons.desc: An ancient gun said to have been given to the human race by a divine being around AUW 1980.

weapons.name: AMORE ROSE
weapons.desc: A precious rose grown using Photon nutrients.

weapons.name: S-RANK SWORDS
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

weapons.name: S-RANK LAUNCHER
weapons.desc: A mysterious weapon. Its abilities are unknown.

armor.desc: Protective gear for Rangers. A thin defensive field. If someone else has a different one...

armor.desc: Protective gear that stimulates the natural healing process for gradual HP recovery.

armor.desc: Special defensive parts that can be equipped only by Androids.

armor.desc: Parasitic armor that boosts defense, but decreases HP. Not equippable by Androids.

armor.name: PARASITE WEAR:Nelgal
armor.desc: Parasitic armor that boosts defense, but decreases HP. Not equippable by Androids.

armor.name: PARASITE WEAR:Vajulla
armor.desc: Parasitic armor that boosts defense, but decreases HP. Not equippable by Androids.

armor.desc: Protective gear that stimulates the wearer's senses, making traps visible. Not useable by Forces.

armor.name: GRAVITON PLATE
armor.desc: Highly protective gear that also lowers accuracy. Not equippable by Forces.

armor.name: ATTRIBUTE PLATE
armor.desc: Protective gear that boosts all resistances when equipped. Not equippable by Forces.

armor.name: FLOWEN'S FRAME
armor.desc: Bears the serial number 52-0003.

armor.name: CUSTOM FRAME ver.OO
armor.desc: Protective gear used by the military mechanic group "Team OO." Proves membership in the Team.

armor.name: DB'S ARMOR
armor.desc: Mysterious armor with "DB" carved in the plate. It is said that there is a matching sword and shield.

armor.name: GUARD WAVE
armor.desc: High quality armor. Damage is dissipated in a wave-like effect across the armor.

armor.name: DF FIELD
armor.desc: Armor that covers the person with a green membrane. Reduces damage from attacks.

armor.name: LUMINOUS FIELD
armor.desc: Special armor that converts drained HP to energy that increases defense.

armor.name: CHU CHU FEVER
armor.desc: Interesting set of armor that sprays mice all over the place. Where do the mice come from?

armor.name: LOVE HEART
armor.desc: Legendary "love" armor. Its defensive power increases when you approach the opposite sex.

armor.name: FLAME GARMENT
armor.desc: The high-heated film on its surface protects its user from enemy attacks.

armor.name: VIRUS ARMOR:Lafuteria
armor.desc: Armor that infects its host with a virus, increasing defense.

armor.name: BRIGHTNESS CIRCLE
armor.desc: Photons encircle this armor to protect against Dark attacks.

armor.name: AURA FIELD
armor.desc: Armor with a protective aura. It has high defensive power, but drains TP.

armor.name: ELECTRO FRAME
armor.desc: This android- only armor sends a current to the neural circuit to boost defense.

armor.name: SACRED CLOTH
armor.desc: The particles of light on the surface of this modern style armor increase its defensive power.

armor.name: SMOKING PLATE
armor.desc: This is a special armor, which has a very high level of defensive ability.
